agency: New York City Public Schools (NYCPS / Department of Education, DOE)
method: Outside-in crawl (browser UA, robots-respecting; /CustomApi, /Sitefinity, /System disallowed and avoided). Sitemap decompressed (gzip) → 4,617 URLs. Section landing pages + representative school/calendar/search pages analyzed. Page data is largely JS-rendered from an internal /CustomApi backend, so on-page row/table counts understate the underlying records.
headline_findings: 3,343 individual school pages (per the sitemap) form the school directory — each a structured School record rendered client-side.
On-domain the data is NOT machine-readable; but NYC Open Data has 638 DOE assets including 462-column High School Directories, School Locations, and Demographic Snapshots.
Site search / 'Find a School' is outsourced to a vendor (HawkSearch) — DOE does not own a public school-search API.
School pages are driven by an internal /CustomApi/* backend that is robots-disallowed, undocumented, and not public.
The enrollment/application workflow (MySchools) is transactional and has no Open Data twin — the net-new API opportunity, analogous to Parks permits.
See tech-stack.md and apis-observed.md for the vendor and backend-API inventory.

fruit.name: School Directory
fruit.notes: Each /schools/<LocationCode> page is a structured School profile (DBN, name, address, phone, principal, grades, district, enrollment). Rendered client-side from /CustomApi.

fruit.name: Find a School (search)
fruit.notes: Powered by HawkSearch vendor API — not a DOE-owned or public search API.

fruit.name: School Year Calendar
fruit.count: full school-year of dates/events; faceted ('Narrow Results')
fruit.notes: Holidays, breaks, no-school days, PD days. No Open Data twin — small but real gap; high everyday value.

fruit.name: Enrollment / MySchools application
fruit.notes: 3K–12 admissions & application (3K/PreK/K/MS/HS/Specialized). Transactional; no Open Data twin. NET-NEW API opportunity, analogous to Parks permit applications.

fruit.name: School Quality Reports / Snapshots
opendata_match: School Quality Reports / Framework datasets (on Open Data + InfoHub)
fruit.notes: Framework scores, survey results, student achievement per school.

fruit.name: Demographics (per school)
fruit.notes: Enrollment by grade, race/ethnicity, gender, poverty, ELL, SWD, Economic Need Index — DBN-keyed.

fruit.name: Test results (SAT / AP / Regents / Specialized HS)
opendata_match: Specialized High Schools Admissions Tests Results
fruit.notes: School-level assessment outcomes; multiple datasets on Open Data.

fruit.name: Demographic Snapshot 2020-21 to 2024-25 (public)
fruit.notes: Citywide/district/school enrollment by grade, race/ethnicity, gender, poverty, ELL, SWD, ENI across five years; DBN-keyed.

fruit.name: School-Level ELA Results 2018-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: Per-school NY State ELA test results 2018-2025 by demographic categories.

fruit.name: School-Level Math Results 2018-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: Per-school NY State Math test results 2018-2025 by demographic categories.

fruit.name: School-Level Science Results 2024-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: Per-school NY State Science test results 2024-2025.

fruit.name: NYC Regents Results 2014-15 to 2022-23 (public)
fruit.notes: Regents exam outcomes over nine years, overall and by category.

fruit.name: Citywide ELA Results 2018-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: Citywide ELA test results 2018-2025 by demographic category.

fruit.name: 2025 Graduation Rates - School Level (public)
fruit.notes: Per-school 2025 graduation/dropout rates by cohort and demographic.

fruit.name: District Attendance Results 2019-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: District-level attendance and chronic absenteeism 2019-2025.

fruit.name: School Attendance Results 2019-2025 (public)
fruit.notes: Per-school attendance and chronic absenteeism 2019-2025 (large-file Azure blob).

fruit.name: 2024-25 School Quality Report Results - High Schools
fruit.notes: 2024-25 School Quality Report framework scores/metrics for high schools.

fruit.name: 2024-25 School Quality Report Results - Elementary/Middle
fruit.notes: 2024-25 School Quality Report results for elementary/middle schools.

fruit.name: 2024-25 School Quality Report Results - District 75
fruit.notes: 2024-25 School Quality Report results for District 75 schools.

fruit.notes: 2025 NYC School Survey student responses by school.
